case_title: PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP VS. FRANCISCO JAVIER DZUL CACERES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP AS TO DEFENDANT DZUL CACERES, FRANCISCO JAVIER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-10-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-10-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CECILIA A. NDOUNDA--LEGAL ASSISTANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
(SC-220) - REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT DZUL CACERES, FRANCISCO JAVIER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DZUL CACERES, FRANCISCO JAVIER $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-10-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

(SC-222)ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS - [X] THE COURT ORDERS [X] PAYMENTS OF $ 500.00 ON THE 5TH . DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING DECEMBER 05, 2014 UNTIL FINAL PAYMENTS APRIL 05, 2015. AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT $ 605.00 [X] THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF PAYMENT IS THE SAME AS THE JUDGMENT, IF ALL PAYMENTS ARE MADE IN FULL AND ON TIME, NO INTEREST WILL BE OWED ON THE JUDGMENT AND THE JUDGMENT IS PAID IN FULL.
